programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shinchan Paanch Ka Punch
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Perman

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and Popat persuade Zordaar to visit the vibrant carnival for amusement. Since they lack sufficient currency for purchases, the trio chooses to participate in a contest to obtain funds.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Kitty encounters a problem when her water hose suddenly stops working. As a result, she seeks help in order to repair it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan barges into the room of a college student to take shelter, she tries to evict him but incurs challenges along the way.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When a cockroach infests the house, Misae asks Shin-chan to help her be rid of it. However, misadventures ensue and the cockroach remains.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and Hiroshi go out on a ski trip during winter. However, they encounter a heavy snow storm which forces them to return home.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan is accompanied by his friends to Nene-chan's house, her mother prepares a cake for them. However, Shin-chan's mischief ruins it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae suffers from a backache, she visits a doctor for a diagnosis and Shin-chan accompanies her. However, Shin-chan annoys the doctor.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Since Shin-chan has had driving training, Misae tries to learn from him. However, he complicates matters by putting traffic signs all over the household.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans on preparing a meal for Hiroshi's client but she forgets a few ingredients. As a result, she instructs Shin-chan to fetch them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to buy taiyaki for his mother Misae, Shin-chan visits a store. However, he proceeds to cause a nuisance and annoy the storekeeper.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a soccer match, Kawamura faces Shin-chan and his friends. However, he underestimates their skills and ends up losing to them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae suffers from a backache, she visits a doctor for a diagnosis and Shin-chan accompanies her. However, Shin-chan annoys the doctor.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan decides to help others, he is met by a man who seeks directions to Kazama's house. However, Shin-chan annoys him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan demands that his mother blow balloons and play with him and does not give her any reprieve, Misae obliges.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After helping his mother Misae with a myriad of household chores, Shin-chan draws on her face with permanent ink when she falls asleep.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training, he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As Misae is about to go out, Shin-chan decides on a code for him and her. Later, when a courier arrives, Shin-chan pesters him and makes him use the code.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits Keiko-san at the hospital with Misae and raises a nuisance for the nurse. Consequently, Misae scolds him for his mischief.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shinchan Movie: Robot Dad
programme.desc: Shin-chan gets excited to see his father Hiroshi turn into a robot. However, he must fight other robots in order to help his father reclaim his original body.

programme.desc: Shin-chan, a mischievous five-year-old, constantly disrupts the lives of those around him with his childish antics, generating humorous chaos and exasperation.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans on preparing a meal for Hiroshi's client but she forgets a few ingredients. As a result, she instructs Shin-chan to fetch them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits the department store with his mother. However, once there, he wanders around and realises that he is lost.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After purchasing dog food for Shiro, Misae instructs Shin-chan to feed Shiro on time. However, Shin-chan forgets to do so.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae falls ill, Shin-chan tries to care for her and fills an ice bag with water. However, he leaves the tap running and causes the house to flood.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After helping his mother Misae with a myriad of household chores, Shin-chan draws on her face with permanent ink when she falls asleep.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan begins a decent march at the Sports Day event but eventually he forgets his steps. Consequently, he ends up confounding the other students as well.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As the winter season reaches its conclusion, the students at the kindergarten and Yoshinaga celebrate by throwing beans out in the air.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi and Misae decide to spend some time playing badminton with Shin-chan, they disagree mid-game and begin to quarrel.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Masao cannot find his crayon, he gets Shin-chan to help him look for it. However, after their investigations, Shin-chan remembers where the crayon is.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and Masao are requested by Takeshi to take him to Masao's house. However, Shin-chan takes him to his house instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Yoshinaga falls sick whilst Shin-chan awaits his mother to receive him. As a result, Shin-Chan asks Matsuzaka for assistance.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.desc: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer battles against Nukili and Bhayankari Pari using Meher's magical tool. However, his attempt to emerge victorious against Bhayankar Pari fails.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: After striving hard, Baalveer manages to control Nukili. So, Meher immediately tries to connect with Katili through telepathy.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The IP school students use unjust techniques to win, as Katili is no longer available to help. They further try to brainwash Montu against his own team.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: An alien space shuttle lands on Earth with some extraterrestrial visitors. Will they be friendly or cause trouble on Earth?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The scientist finds out about the aliens and their intentions which puts his life in danger. Will he be able to inform others on time?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Aliens travel to the space center to talk on their concern about the extinction of their species.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak rushes to Gada Electronics and finds Jethalal in an unusually calm demeanour. Jethalal reveals that Bagha didn't steal any goods from his shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi requests his wife to sit next to him because he wants to tell her a secret. But then, Sodhi says he will tell her about it later.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan is worried about the secret Sodhi will reveal and thus, she announces a meeting with the ladies of Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the fortune teller does not have any concrete answers, Anjali makes Roshan fake sickness to coerce Sodhi into revealing his secret.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi finally reveals to the residents of Gokuldham society that the only way to uncover his secret is for them to wait until eight thirty in the night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While the women of Gokuldham Society talk about Roshan's news, the men come together to discuss the party that lies ahead.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham's residents try their hardest to crack what Sodhi is hiding. Ultimately, after Champaklal's help, they find Sodi praying.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: At long last, Sodhi reveals his secret to Roshan by going down on one knee to proclaim his love. As she gets irate, Sodhi reminds her it is the day he first proposed to her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries his best to control the situation at the temple. Later, when Jeannie pays a visit to Gokuldham, Popatlal asks her to find him a girl to marry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya informs Jethalal that as per her intuition, something very good is going to happen. Champaklal is unwillingly whisked away by producer Modi to meet someone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is flummoxed when a stranger messages him and asks him to get ready for some fun. The stranger is none other than Bollywood actor Ajay Devgn.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of Gokuldham society receive strange invitations from a stranger. Later, they all gather in the evening to discuss the matter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is shocked to see Sundar. Later, the members are unsure about who has decorated the society premises.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After much drama and deliberation over Champaklal's disappearance, the truth is revealed. Everyone is shocked to see Ajay Devgn and Sonakshi Sinha enter the premises.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bollywood actors Ajay Devgn and Sonakshi Sinha join the Gokuldham members to mark a milestone in their journey.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When two murders take place due to food poisoning, the suspicion is on the 'dabbawala' who have been delivering food to them. On investigating, Team CID believe someone else is behind the poisoning.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Team CID travels to Manali to investigate the murder of a girl who is found buried in snow. She was staying at a hotel with a man and seems to have been strangulated to death.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide requests Jethalal to deposit a maintenance cheque on time. Meanwhile, Champaklal returns from his trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha comes up with a special way to boost sales at Gada Electronics. Meanwhile, Bhide and Madhavi decide to clean their house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide feels too sentimental to let some of his old belongings go. Soon, he attempts to explain his feelings to Madhavi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul reveals that garbage has been dumped outside the society office. Soon, Madhavi realises Bhide and Sodhi deceived her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal and Madhavi secretly sell all of Bhide's old belongings. Later, Bhide seeks advice from Goli.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide tries to teach Popatlal about the importance of preserving old belongings. Soon, Bhide enlists Taarak's help to get his message across.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sensing Bhide's emotional attachment to his antiquities, Madhavi offers to purchase the box from the scrap dealer. However, she is surprised to learn that Popatlal is the new owner of the box.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Lord Vishnu speaks to Devaki and Vasudev about his plan to be born as their child. Meanwhile, Kansa's guards fall asleep and Vasudev escapes with his child.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: The Super Dancers dazzle with humour-laced routines. Later, comedy icons Bharti, Harssh, Dr Sanket and Sugandha watch in awe as the young talents shine.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A group of men bother the women of Gokuldham on their way back. However, the women decide not to tell their husbands and deal with the problem themselves.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ladies of Gokuldham prepare to confront Lovely and his group of eve teasers. They decide to arm themselves with unusual weapons and get ready for a big fight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and friends rush to meet Ranbir Kapoor. Bapuji praises him and his family for their extraordinary work.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide organises an emergency meeting to arrive at a common consensus on the trip to Singapore. Popatlal confesses that he does not wish to go on a trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham's residents convince Popatlal to join the Singapore trip, but they become upset after learning about their conflicting schedules.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal gives a breakfast treat to Jethalal. Bhide learns that Tappu Sena is going on a study trip in Bengaluru.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha imagines Jethalal bald during his daydream and believes that it is a sign of good luck. Jethalal learns that he's getting an exclusive contract.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Tapu and Jethalal leave, Champaklal is all alone at home and sees a ghost in the opposite building.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide realises that Champaklal is scared, he asks Sodhi to help him. Champaklal informs them about the dark shadow that he saw.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and Bhide take Champaklal to the building after he sights a strange figure. Champaklal is unable to sleep as he feels haunted.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal requests Bhide to investigate Mohanlal's apartment after the ghost sighting. However, Bhide fails to get hold of the keys, which worries Champaklal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal decides to bring the plant that he believes can ward off the spirit from his house. Taarak feels worried about his behaviour.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Popatlal decides to leave from work, he learns about the bridal ghost. He musters courage to leave from work and hails a rickshaw, but something eerie leaves him shocked.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Popatlal sees the ghost as well, he rushes to inform Taarak about it. Sodhi, tired of the chaos, decides to break the lock and find the truth.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Despite being scared of the ghost, the members decide to go along with Sodhi to Mohanlal's apartment and look for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The society members run for their lives after they see strange objects in Mohanlal's apartment. Bhide then calls up Chalu Pandey to investigate the house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chalu Pandey gets informed by everyone about the situation and decides to go to Mohanlal's place to see if there is something fishy and to end all the drama.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The society members discover several weird things inside Mohanlal's apartment. Bhide decides to call Chalu Pandey to investigate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal decides to sleep at Champaklal's house because of the ghost. In the middle of the night, he is woken up by the spirit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The bridal ghost appears to Popatlal. She reveals that she wants to marry him and forcefully makes him perform the wedding rituals.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Popatlal tells everyone about his nightmare, Sodhi gives him medicine to help him cope with his fears.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi, tired of Champaklal and Popatlal's behaviour, gives them some alcohol to calm them down. However, both get drunk and run to Mohanlal's apartment.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone tries to find a solution for the ongoing problem in the Gokuldham Society. Champaklal unintentionally tells Jethalal the truth, making him decide to head home immediately.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After hearing about Popatlal's scary experience, the Gokuldham Society members devise a plan to scare off flat buyers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide accompanies the prospective buyers to Mohanlal's apartment. However, something strange makes all of them run for their lives.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ghost tells the society members that she will not leave until she gets married. Left without an option, the members call a ghostbuster.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethlal arrives late at night and is startled to see the society quiet. Gripped with fear, the society members lock themselves in Champaklal's room.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Drama Category.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Chaos erupts in the heavens as Tarakasur kidnaps Devasena, sparking a brutal clash between the Devas and the Asuras. Will the Devas be able to defeat the Asuras?

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The battle between Tarakasur and Lord Kartikeya rages on, with Kartikeya fighting to break through Tarakasur's illusions and finally end his reign.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Bulbul Pandey arrives at the station before the award show to mock Haseena and her officers. Later, Qayamat drops a visit to Bulbul Pandey's station.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Haseena refuses to grant leave to any of her officers during Holi. Meanwhile, a water balloon mishap causes Karishma to lose some of her hearing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham celebrate ten years together in their signature style while a homesick Jethalal calls Daya in Ahmedabad to ask when she will return.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal arrives with a generous spread at Jethalal's house during breakfast. Meanwhile, Sonu notifies Bhide of Tappu Sena's impending educational excursion to Bengaluru.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The villagers are left confused when Sai prevents them from volunteering. On the other hand, Kulkarni fumes with anger when he sees Dabholkar at Sai's hermitage.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The social conflict in Shirdi explodes exponentially as the men forbid women from going to the workshop. In the meantime, both men and women are left irritated with Sai's behaviour.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai cites the example of a bullock cart and teaches an important lesson to the villagers. In the meantime, Dabholkar witnesses Sai performing a miracle.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: After overcoming numerous obstacles, Dabholkar completes writing a book on Sai. Later, he visits Sai and seeks his blessings for the book.
